# SAT test CSDs (public fixtures)

These are SAT's PUBLIC test certificates (Certificados_Pruebas.zip, mirrored on
developers.sw.com.mx and across open-source CFDI projects). Key passphrase:
`12345678a`. They chain to SAT's "pruebas" CA and are rejected by every
production PAC — they exist only for sandbox/offline testing.

These are the ONLY private keys ever allowed in this repository. A real CSD
must never be committed anywhere.
